introSection: Whirlwind Racer was a wooden roller coaster located at Riverside Park in Agawam, Massachusetts, USA. Designed by Harry G. Traver, it operated from 1928 until 1933, when the park originally closed.
fullText: Whirlwind Racer was a wooden roller coaster located at Riverside Park in Agawam, Massachusetts, USA. Designed by Harry G. Traver, it operated from 1928 until 1933, when the park originally closed.
